name: Cashville
description_short: Cashville Gold is a Nashville-based precious metals buyer specializing in gold, silver, jewelry, coins, and diamonds with 55+ years of family operation.
description_long:
Cashville Gold is a third-generation family-owned precious metals and jewelry buyer established over 55 years ago in Nashville, Tennessee. The business is operated by Jerry Levine (CEO) and his son, positioning themselves as deeply rooted in the local community. They have been voted the #1 place to sell gold, silver, coins, and bullion in Tennessee for 17 consecutive years according to their website, with endorsements from local media outlets News Channel 5 TV and Fox 17.

The company buys a wide range of precious metal items and collectibles, including broken or discarded gold and silver jewelry, rare coins, bullion, platinum, palladium, diamonds, luxury watches (Rolex, Tag Heuer, Tiffany pieces), and silver flatware and serving pieces. They also handle estate liquidation services. Cashville Gold emphasizes immediate payment—"we pay the most money on the spot"—and claims to offer competitive pricing backed by their decades of experience in the precious metals market.

What distinguishes Cashville Gold is their emphasis on longevity and local trust. They repeatedly highlight their 55+ year track record, family ownership, and permanent physical location in Nashville (2500 8th Ave S, Nashville TN 37204). Their marketing stresses that clients can return repeatedly with confidence the business will still be operating, and they position themselves as neighbors rather than transient operators. They also note that items do not need to be cleaned or polished before sale, as they purchase for metal and content value rather than aesthetic condition.

As a precious metals buyer and pawn-shop equivalent, Cashville Gold functions as a liquidity source for individuals looking to convert personal items into immediate cash. However, consumers should understand this is not a credit product—it is a direct purchase transaction based on the intrinsic value of materials. The company provides no financing, credit-building, or loan repayment mechanisms. Their pricing and fairness depend on transparent weight and purity testing at the point of sale.
address: 236 Rep. John Lewis Way N, Nashville, TN 37219

company_info.headquarters: 236 Rep. John Lewis Way N, Nashville, TN 37219

pros: 55+ years in business with three generations of family ownership, suggesting stability and long-term reliability
Voted #1 for 17 consecutive years by local media (News Channel 5 TV, Fox 17) for selling gold and precious metals
Immediate on-the-spot payment for precious metals and jewelry without requiring cleaning or preparation
Broad range of accepted items including broken/damaged jewelry, rare coins, bullion, platinum, palladium, diamonds, and luxury watches
Physical office location in Nashville with direct face-to-face transactions across a desk
Specializes in estate liquidation services, simplifying liquidation of large collections
Experienced pricing team with decades of expertise in precious metals valuation
cons: No independent verification of pricing claims; rely on company's assertion they 'pay the most' without third-party audits or price comparisons published
Limited geographic reach—physical location only in Nashville, Tennessee; no online mail-in program mentioned
No transparency provided on pricing methodology, weight/purity testing processes, or fee structures on the website
Not a credit or lending product; cannot help consumers build credit or access emergency funds through collateral-based loans like traditional pawn shops
Awards and endorsements are self-reported; no independent verification of '17 consecutive years' #1 ranking or media claims
best_for: Nashville-area residents with broken, unwanted, or inherited gold and silver jewelry to liquidate for immediate cash
Estate executors or families managing liquidation of large precious metals and coin collections
Collectors with rare coins or bullion seeking experienced appraisal and fair-market purchase
diagnosis: Cashville Gold is best for Nashville residents and estate liquidators with precious metals and jewelry to convert into immediate cash. The primary caveat is that this is a direct-purchase transaction, not a credit product—it provides liquidity only through selling items, not through loans or financing mechanisms.
services: Gold jewelry purchase (broken, bent, twisted, scrap, or unwanted)
Diamond purchase (all styles, sizes, and shapes)
Luxury watch purchase (Rolex, Tag Heuer, Tiffany pieces)
Platinum and palladium precious metals purchase
